name: Alien
short_description: 'Alien' is a cartoon style 2D platform jumping type game. Players need to control their characters to avoid the enemy and finally reach the end to win.
detailed_description:
'Alien' is a cartoon style 2D platform jumping type game. Players need to control their characters to avoid the enemy and finally reach the end to win.
[Game operation]
Map
Direction: up, down, left, right
Enter level: Z
Level
Move: left, right
Jump: Z
Entrance: up
[Game features]
The character controlled by the player cannot touch the enemy from the front or back, otherwise the game will fail, but can jump up and trample on the enemy, which is also the only way to defeat the enemy.
Players need to jump through different terrain and avoid enemies to reach the destination.
Get as many gold coins as possible before reaching the destination, so that you can get higher points.
The game is easy to operate and suitable for playing in leisure time.
